channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: What happened in the first half of the Spain vs Argentina World Cup final?
item.description: All the biggest talking points and statistics from the first 45 minutes of a goalless World Cup final in New Jersey.

item.title: Andy Burnham’s in-tray: The challenges facing the new UK PM
item.description: Andy Burnham will become Britain's next prime minister on Monday, with huge challenges and opportunities.

item.title: Twin earthquakes strike Peru killing at least five
item.description: Peruvian authorities say the magnitude 5.1 and 3.7 quakes were in the mountainous Junin region east of Lima.

item.title: The UK gets its seventh prime minister in 10 years
item.description: Incoming PM Andy Burnham will immediately face foreign policy challenges, including the conflicts in Ukraine and Iran.

item.title: Five passengers found drifting days after boat sinks in Indonesia
item.description: Five passengers, including a seven-year-old girl, were rescued from a passenger boat that sank in Indonesia.

item.title: Fans light up NYC’s Little Argentina ahead of Spain World Cup final clash
item.description: Fans light up NYC’s Little Argentina ahead of Spain World Cup final clash.

item.title: Trump visit causes logistical delays at World Cup final
item.description: Al Jazeera reporters faced lengthy queues to enter the stadium due to tighter security checks.

item.title: The story behind Gaza’s #TheyLiedToYou campaign
item.description: The story behind Gaza’s #TheyLiedToYou campaign

item.title: Lebanese food influencer sentenced to life for drug smuggling
item.description: Georges Hanna Dib, known as Dr Food, sentenced for smuggling hashish out of Lebanon in cake packaging.

item.title: ‘Sacred unity’: Iran’s supreme leader calls for calm amid political divides
item.description: Decree comes after hardline backers of the Iranian government accused officials of treason for signing an MoU with US.

item.title: At least 50 Malian soldiers killed in attack on military convoy
item.description: At least 50 Malian soldiers were killed after a joint Malian army and Russia's Africa Corps convoy was ambushed.

item.title: Lebanon’s President Joseph Aoun meets Rubio ahead of Trump talks
item.description: Aoun is expected to meet Donald Trump on Tuesday, as Beirut seeks US backing to end Israel-Hezbollah fighting.

item.title: NYC swells with Spanish, Argentinian fans anticipating World Cup glory
item.description: World Cup in NYC offered a chance for Mayor Zohran Mamdani to display progressive messaging on the world stage.

item.title: What happened to the Jewish left?
item.description: Marc Lamont Hill speaks to Molly Crabapple about the Jewish Labour Bund, anti-Zionism and the Jewish left today.

item.title: Iraqi-born singer Emmanuel Kelly among World Cup half-time show headliners
item.description: Abandoned as a baby and brought up by nuns in Baghdad, Kelly will be preforming alongside global megastars.

item.title: Syria’s Al-Sharaa reshuffles security and intelligence leadership
item.description: Government says the shake-up will strengthen security and clear the way for reconstruction.

item.title: Israeli settlers torch homes and mosque in Masafer Yatta
item.description: Videos show Israeli settlers attacking the Palestinian village of al Tuwani in Masafer Yatta, south of Hebron.

item.title: 5.6 magnitude earthquake hits Peru
item.description: Footage shows firefighters looking for a missing person amongst the rubble of a collapsed building in Pumpunya, Peru.

item.title: Israel uses law to destroy Palestinian education in East Jerusalem
item.description: Legislation recently passed by the Knesset is meant to dismantle the Palestinian education system in East Jerusalem.

item.title: Kimi Antonelli wins Belgian Grand Prix to extend F1 championship lead
item.description: Mercedes driver won his sixth GP of 2026 as championship rival and teammate George Russell crashes out on first lap.

item.title: Designing cities for a hotter future
item.description: Climate advocate Mina Hasman’s vision of designing cities that behave like forests and buildings that act like trees.

item.title: Tate brothers arrested in the US
item.description: Video shows the moment controversial influencer brothers Andrew Tate and Tristan Tate were arrested in Miami, US.

item.title: Spain vs Argentina LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 final
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as Spain play Argentina in the final of the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Why is Argentina’s football team so white?
item.description: Argentina prepares to face Spain in the World Cup final.

item.title: Iran attacks US Gulf allies, causing a fire at Kuwait power plant
item.description: Kuwait and Bahrain report several rounds of Iranian missile, drone attacks; sirens reportedly sound in Jordan.
